description: SMS announcing the CSF round opening with no safe-harbour reference at all — must fail ADV-001 under the universal-channel gate (2026-04-27 founder directive). Tightest SMS character budget is no excuse to omit the safe-harbour: the shortened paraphrase 'general CSF risk warning' is acceptable and short.
text: FarmThru: your VIP link is live. Reserve your spot before 23 Jun. https://birchal.com/farmthru
